description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ssssam/buildstream-flatpak:3 Docker image, setting BST to "bst --colors" and XDG_CACHE_HOME to ${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/cache, and caching ${XDG_CACHE_HOME}/buildstream/sources/. Define a single job named build_and_test (default stage) that runs a before_script inserting the current commit SHA into flatpak/elements/tagcloud.bst, then executes the script steps: cd flatpak; bst build tagcloud-flatpak.bst; bst build tagcloud-test-environment.bst and bst shell commands to mount the project, run meson configuration, and run xvfb-run dbus-launch meson test --verbose; add the flathub remote and install the GNOME runtime; execute ./deploy.sh and verify the app with flatpak run uk.me.afuera.Tagcloud --help; finally create a flatpak bundle with flatpak build-bundle ./tagcloud-flatpak/repo ../tagcloud.flatpak uk.me.afuera.Tagcloud. The job archives the generated tagcloud.flatpak as an artifact that expires in one month and is tagged with "flatpak".
